text:
Created attachment 166384
WebKitWebProcess stack trace

gdb backtrace for WebKitWebProcess.core after an epiphany crash

epiphany was ran from terminal window. After the crash, two core files were dumped; epiphany,core and WebKitWebProcess.core

Attached output has been produced by invoking gdb from the command line;
gdb /usr/local/libexec/webkit2gtk-4.0/WebKitWebProcess WebKitWebProcess.core
